'''Expora''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Chandrila system/Legends|Chandrila system]], located in the [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector]] of the [[Ringali Shell]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. The planet [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Chandrila (star)|Chandrila]] and was composed of [[Temperature/Legends|searing]] rock. Expora was the only one of the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] planets to have no [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. The entirety of the Chandrila system lay on the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]],<ref name="CatCW" /> which served as a dividing line between the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] and the [[Arrowhead]] portion of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Expora was mentioned in the [[2003]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''.<ref name="CatCW" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Chandrila system, and therefore Expora, in grid square L-9.<ref name="TEA" />
